title: 2025-11-13 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 12.28
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2025-11-13: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 12.28/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-11-13, the score printed 12.28/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
